creator: sasamotikomi@gmail.com
text:
In FreeBSD Wiki i see xorg-server 1.14X ready and 1.15 ready for test why not add it as developer port to ports tree, of course if it really ready for testing
https://wiki.freebsd.org/Graphics

Developer repo from wiki out of date.
http://trillian.chruetertee.ch/ports/browser/trunk/

Define option WITH_EXPERIMENTAL_XORG (switch from 1.14.x to 1.15.x)

Before commit it need actualize version:

add new port:
x11-server/xorg-sever-devel
last  version 1.14x - 1.14.7
last stable 1.15x - 1.15.2
last experimental 1.15.99.904
http://cgit.freedesktop.org/xorg/xserver/

add new port:
x11-drivers/xf86-video-intel-devel/
last developer version 2.99.912
http://cgit.freedesktop.org/xorg/driver/xf86-video-intel/

multimedia/libva/
last version 1.3.2
http://cgit.freedesktop.org/vaapi/intel-driver


x11-drivers/xf86-video-ati/
last version 7.4.0 update or add developer version
GLAMOR now work with r300/r500 
http://cgit.freedesktop.org/xorg/driver/xf86-video-ati/commit/?id=515bcf14d514f9dcaaf30fd0bf1ef6dd6ba9a0cd
and should be enable by default, hd7xxx-hd8xxx r7-r9 2xx GLAMOR only cards(hardware acceleration disabled by default)
cgit.freedesktop.org/xorg/driver/xf86-video-ati/

x11/nvidia-driver/
Update to 337.25
add new port 340.24
http://www.nvidia.com/object/unix.html

libdrm
graphics/libdrm/
http://cgit.freedesktop.org/mesa/drm
last version 2.4.54

add new ports:
Dri
graphics/dri-devel/
last version 10.2.3

libosmesa
graphics/libosmesa/
last version 10.2.3
http://cgit.freedesktop.org/mesa/mesa/

Mesa-demos
graphics/mesa-demos
http://cgit.freedesktop.org/mesa/demos/
last version 8.2.0
